creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Unfortunately, as you both point out, the exact signature of C constructors and destructors is not explicitly documented.  However, glibc calls them without any arguments, and ignores the return value:

https://sourceware.org/git/?p=glibc.git;a=blob;f=elf/soinit.c;h=fe9935732b2dcc3d71b5c0f2e52c32efc642d160;hb=HEAD#l20

and all its test cases and examples use void func(void).
